memoryArtifacts.headline: Amlaíb mac Sitric (c. 927-980; Old Norse: Óláfr Sigtryggsson)
memoryArtifacts.description: Amlaíb mac Sitric (c. 927-980; Old Norse: Óláfr Sigtryggsson), commonly called Amlaíb Cuarán, in Old Norse: Óláfr kváran, was a 10th-century Norse-Gael who was King of Northumbria and Dublin. His byna …

zh.Iona, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特易納
zh.lifeSummary: 當Amlaíb Cuarán於0927年出生時，他的父親Sihtric Cáech ua Ímair King of Northumbria10924歲，母親St. Eadgyth of Wessex Abbess of Tamworth32歲。他於0945年之前與wife Olaf Amlaib Sihtricsson結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約0980年在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特易納享年54歲。

zh-hans.Iona, Scotland: 英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特易納
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amlaíb Cuarán于0927年出生时，他的父亲Sihtric Cáech ua Ímair King of Northumbria10924岁，母亲St. Eadgyth of Wessex Abbess of Tamworth32岁。他于0945年之前与wife Olaf Amlaib Sihtricsson结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约0980年在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特易納享年54岁。

en.Iona, Scotland: Iona, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom

nameMeanings.name: Cuarán
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Indian (Rajasthan, Gujarat, Madhya Pradesh): name with several possible origins: (i) from Sanskrit chara ‘movement’; (ii) from the dialect word uccharan, meaning ‘to speak’ in Sanskrit; or (iii) from the dialect word charanau meaning ‘to wander’ in Sanskrit. The community bearing this name were traditionally keepers of royal genealogical records, especially of the Rajput kings in the 13th and 14th centuries AD .

en.lifeSummary: When Amlaíb Cuarán was born in 0927, his father, Sihtric Cáech ua Ímair King of Northumbria, was 10924 and his mother, St. Eadgyth of Wessex Abbess of Tamworth, was 32. He married wife Olaf Amlaib Sihtricsson before 0945. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 0980, in Iona, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.Iona, Scotland: Iona, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amlaíb Cuarán est né en 0927, son père, Sihtric Cáech ua Ímair King of Northumbria, avait 10924 ans et sa mère, St. Eadgyth of Wessex Abbess of Tamworth, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé wife Olaf Amlaib Sihtricsson avant 0945. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 0980, à Iona, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.Iona, Scotland: Iona, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Amlaíb Cuarán 0927 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sihtric Cáech ua Ímair King of Northumbria 10924 und seine Mutter St. Eadgyth of Wessex Abbess of Tamworth 32. Er hat vor 0945 wife Olaf Amlaib Sihtricsson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 0980 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Iona, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato wife Olaf Amlaib Sihtricsson prima del 0945. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 0980, nel Iona, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Amlaíb Cuaránが0927年に生まれた時，父Sihtric Cáech ua Ímair King of Northumbriaは10924歳，母St. Eadgyth of Wessex Abbess of Tamworthは32歳であった。0945年以前にwife Olaf Amlaib Sihtricssonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約0980年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトアイオナで54歳で死去した。

ko.Iona, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 이오나
ko.lifeSummary: Amlaíb Cuarán(이)가 0927년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sihtric Cáech ua Ímair King of Northumbria(은)는 10924세였고, 그의 어머니 St. Eadgyth of Wessex Abbess of Tamworth(은)는 32세였다. 그는 0945년 이전 wife Olaf Amlaib Sihtricsson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 0980년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 이오나에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com wife Olaf Amlaib Sihtricsson antes 0945. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 0980, em Iona, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.Iona, Scotland: иона, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amlaíb Cuarán родился в 0927 г., его отцу по имени Sihtric Cáech ua Ímair King of Northumbria было 10924 года, а матери, которую звали St. Eadgyth of Wessex Abbess of Tamworth, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени wife Olaf Amlaib Sihtricsson перед 0945 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 0980 г. в местности иона, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.
